scenarios.name: API request validation with custom rules
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses Pydantic v1 @validator decorators with the values dict pattern instead of v2's @field_validator and @model_validator(mode="after"), while the treatment uses both v2 decorators correctly for the cross-field date check.

scenarios.name: Type-safe environment configuration
scenarios.rationale: Baseline relies on python-dotenv plus a plain BaseModel with manual os.getenv calls and string coercion, while the treatment uses pydantic_settings.BaseSettings with model_config env_file binding and typed list[str]/bool fields that auto-coerce.
